boundaries.source_boundary: Research summaries and synthetic packets only; no raw records are included.
boundaries.subject_boundary: Population-level and infrastructure-level claims only, not individual guidance.
boundaries.modality_boundary: Textual source map and schema validation; no imaging, sensor, or genomic input.
boundaries.species_context_boundary: Human healthcare, veterinary infrastructure, and general science AI are separated.
boundaries.temporal_boundary: Evidence cutoff is the scan date; future claims require a new packet revision.
boundaries.tool_boundary: Validator checks packet structure but does not verify external scientific truth.
boundaries.privacy_boundary: Only public sources and synthetic fixtures may enter reusable test memory.

dataset_gaps: No raw longitudinal EHR or veterinary dataset is included.
Benchmark availability differs by species, institution, and modality.
subject_gaps: No individual human or animal subject is represented.
modality_gaps: No direct clinical notes, images, labs, wearable data, or sensor streams are included.
temporal_gaps: Frontier sources may change after the scan date.
privacy_gaps: The gate models privacy status but does not prove de-identification safety.

revision_reason: Add an operation-level boundary check before memory writes, retrieval, reuse, export, or handoff.
falsification_route: Run blinded curator review and reject this gate if it does not reduce unsupported memory promotion or boundary drift.
next_executable_action: Run the regression test script for the memory operation boundary validator.
